questions.question: Name the popular TV show in the 60s set in Hooterville at the Shady Rest Hotel, run by a widow and her three daughters.
An American icon created for the U.S. Forest Service, this character had a song, books and advertising spots.
What musical included songs 'Some Enchanted Evening,' and 'There is Nothing Like a Dame'?
